法律责任：
                        
                                      关于法律责任，郑重声明如下：

1、AE学习助手提供的所有下载文件资源均为网络共享资源，本站为非营利性站点，所有资源均是网上搜集或私下交流
学习/研究之用，任何涉及商业盈利目的均不得使用，否则产生的一切后果由您自己承担！本站仅仅提供一个观摩
学习的环境，将不对任何资源负法律责任。未经原公司（作者）许可请勿用于任何商业用途，如需商用请自行联系
原公司（作者）商议商用事宜！请勿擅自私自商用！否则后果自负！请于下载后的24小时内删除。如需体验更多乐
趣，还请支持正版。


2、我们提供用户下载的所有内容均来自互联网。如有内容侵犯您的版权或其他利益的请及时发送授权证书和相关文件联
系我们。我们会在收到消息后及时处理删除相关资源。

联系邮箱：48991272@qq.com

   ║   根据二OO二年一月一日《计算机软件保护条例》规定：
         为了学习和研究软件内含的设计思想和原理，通过安装、显示、传输或者
         存储软件等方式使用软件的，可以不经软件著作权人许可，不向其支付报
         酬！鉴于此，也希望大家按此说明研究软件和资源！谢谢！

For study / research purposes, no commercial profit is allowed, otherwise all the consequences will be borne by you! This site provides only one observation.
The learning environment will not be legally responsible for any resources. Do not use it for any commercial purposes without the permission of the original company(author).
The original company(author) discusses commercial matters! No unauthorized business! Or the consequences! Please delete within 24 hours after downloading. If you need to experience more fun
Fun, please also support genuine.
2, we provide users to download all the content from the Internet. If content infringes on your copyright or other interests, please send your license and related documents in time.
It's us. We will delete the relevant resources as soon as we receive the message.

Attachment:
According to the "Computer Software Protection Regulations" of January 1, 2002:
In order to learn and study the design ideas and principles contained in the software, by installing, displaying, transmitting, or
Where software is stored or used by other means, no payment may be made to the software copyright owner without his permission
Pay! In view of this, we also hope that you will follow the instructions to study software and resources! Thank you!

interests, please send authorization certificate and related documents in time.

resources in time after receiving the message.


Attachment:


           According to the Regulations on the Protection of Computer Software of January 1, 2002:


           To learn and study the design ideas and principles contained in software, install, display, 
           transmit, or

If the software is used by storage software or other means, it may not be paid 
           to the software copyright owner without the permission of the software copyright owner.

           and resources! Thank you!
